steps.title: Find the shared purpose
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between mass fraction and mole fraction. The notes show that both measures indicate the relative abundance of an element, though one uses mass and the other uses atom count.

steps.title: State both measures' role
steps.content: The matching option names the difference in how the measures are calculated while emphasizing their shared purpose of indicating relative abundance. Choice A only lists values, Choice C incorrectly defines mole fraction using mass, and Choice D emphasizes difference rather than similarity. The answer is B.
